abilities.name: Armor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Best Hats in Town
abilities.text: After this model is deployed, summon up to two Habber-Dashers within 6" of it.

abilities.name: Cog in Your Plans
abilities.text: Once per activation. After a Scheme marker is made within 3", this model may drain a (soulstone) or discard a card to summon a Habber-Dasher into base contact with the made marker.

actions.name: Mechanical Hooves
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action receives +1 Skl and any one suit if it was generated by the Charge action.

triggers.name: See Yer Weakness:
triggers.text: Remove a friendly token from the target. When resolving, deal +2 damage.

triggers.name: You're Comin' With Me:
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3", then place this model into base contact with it.

triggers.name: Volley:
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again targeting a different model, drawing range and LoS from the original target.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets:
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Bacon-Greased Lightning
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Once per activation. Move this model up to 5", ignoring enemy models. Enemy models moved through this way gain a Staggered token.

triggers.name: "Lost My Hat!":
triggers.text: Summon a Habber-Dasher in base contact with this model.
